fix(livestream): Add diagnostic logging to session recording Kafka consumer

Add logging to help debug why session recording events are not being processed:
- Log on successful topic subscription
- Log periodic timeout counts (every 60 timeouts)
- Log first 5 messages and every 10,000th with header keys
- Log first 5 dropped messages with full header details

Also fix fmt.Println to use log.Printf in configs for consistency.
